              (?P<escaped>zC)  |   # Escape sequence of two delimiters
              (?P<named>zJ)       |   # delimiter and a Python identifier
              {(?P<braced>z
)} |   # delimiter and a braced identifier
              (?P<invalid>)             # Other ill-formed delimiter exprs
